text.autoconfig.guiscaler.title: GUI Scaler Config
text.autoconfig.guiscaler.option.enableA: Automatically adjust GUI scale based on window size
text.autoconfig.guiscaler.option.mode.@T:
AUTO: Intelligent scaling based on resolution and pixel density
CUSTOM: Use custom rules defined below
text.autoconfig.guiscaler.option.customR:
Define custom scale rules: Window Width -> GUI Scale
Example: 2560 -> 3 means use scale 3 for 2560px width
